pattern: Components whose values exist only at Lv92/Lv96/Lv100 are valid VU-only additions.
resolution: Do not flag blank Lv30/Lv50 for component-level values when all parsed values are VU levels.

pattern: A labeled condition can represent skill continuation without a numeric effect cell.
resolution: Create a condition-only component with effect_kind skill_continue and attach per-level probability values from the matching probability label.

pattern: One value expression may apply to both ATK and DEF, or unlabeled same-stat values may need condition-order mapping.
resolution: Split shared ATK/DEF values into separate components and use condition labels/order to assign repeated values.

pattern: Effect text can place labels after effect names or group multiple labeled numeric values under one effect kind.
resolution: Parse label-value pairs even when the label does not precede the effect keyword directly.

pattern: Skill-level rows may say 下記参照 while a nearby subtable contains authoritative seasonal values.
resolution: Merge the seasonal subtable into per-level component values; keep explicit seasonal target_scope so later text enrichment cannot overwrite it.
